_note: Updated script with warm-up angle + trimmed per demo review feedback

clips.text: Hundreds of millions of singers practice alone with zero feedback. This is Koda — your AI vocal coach, powered by Gemini Live.
clips._note: 9s. Unified framing: coaching, not just strain detection. 'Practice alone' includes warm-ups.

clips.text: One tap. Gemini greets you and starts the warm-up.
clips._note: Quick. Let Gemini's greeting be the star.

clips.text: Multiple acoustic analyzers run in parallel — measuring vocal fold closure, harmonic stability, and timbral strain. Total pipeline latency: ninety-six milliseconds. The baseline adapts to your voice, not fixed thresholds.
clips._note: Trimmed from 52 to 28 words per review. Lead with 96ms. Save algorithm names for architecture shot.

clips.text: When you push too hard, Koda sees it immediately. Shimmer spikes. Cepstral peak prominence drops. The strain engine fuses these signals in real-time.
clips._note: Energy rises with strain. 'Watch this' energy.

clips.text: At every breath point, Gemini speaks a technique cue. Not scripted — it reads the strain data and improvises.
clips._note: After coaching cue plays. Trimmed to essentials.

clips.text: The singer adjusts. The gauge drops back to green. That is the feedback loop — Gemini coaches, you respond, Koda measures the result.
clips._note: THE wow moment. The closed loop. This replaces 'second cue' — correction is more powerful.

clips.text: After each song, Gemini delivers a spoken summary. One persistent session — every phrase, every zone transition stays in context.
clips._note: Trimmed. 'No resets' removed per review — judges might not know what it means.

clips.text: Browser captures audio over WebSocket. Cloud Run backend runs multiple analyzers in parallel — Parselmouth, C P P, perceptual engine, phonation classifier. The strain engine triggers Gemini Live at each phrase boundary. Native audio generation.
clips._note: Rapid-fire. Removed wavelet scattering claim (not running). Removed 'not TTS' (judges might not know what TTS means).

clips.text: Most people who love to sing will never work with a vocal coach. Koda changes that. Powered by Gemini Live.
clips._note: SLOW. Emotional. Simple and memorable. Daniel's preferred line.
